book(B, D, T) :- borrower(B), due_date(D), title(T).

{book(B, D, T) : borrower(B), due_date(D)} = 1 :- title(T).

% The only predicate needed to represent the matching of borrower, due_date, and title.
match(B, D, T) :- book(B, D, T).
